titleStmt.title: SII 16.89: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 89. (A.R. No. 91 of 1912.) GŌRAṆṬLA, HINDUPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up at the entrance into the Śiva temple.
This inscription is dated Śaka 1446, Tāraṇa, Adhika Bhādrapada śu. 15, Sunday, corresponding to 1524 A.D., August 14.

It records that Sūraparāju, the kāryakarta of Vākiṭi Ādeppa-nāyaniṅgāru, having ordered Nalanāgana, Yaṟanāgana, Sōmana, Basavana and Chiṁnapa, the taṁmaḷas of the temple of Sōmeśvara at Gōraṇṭla to repair the dilapidated temple and the śikhara and build a mudwall for it, exempted them from the service of supplying leaves free of cost to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1446 Agunēṭi tāraṇasaṁ
vatsara Adhikabhādrapada śu 15 Ā śrīmanmahārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa tirumaladēvamahārāyalu prithivi
rājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu vākiṭi Ādeppanāyaniṁgāri kā¨ryya
ka¨rttalayina sūraparājugāru gōraṁṭla sōmēśvaruni sthānikulu
nalanāgana yaranāgana sōmana basavana ciṁnapagāriki yicina dha¨rmaśāsa
naṁ yī taṁmaḷuvāru visterākulaveṭi cestāUṁḍaganu yī
dināna tiṁmappanāyani Ādeppanāyanigāriki puṁṇyaṁgānu
sōmēśvaruni guḍinni sikharamunnu cithilamayina tāUlaku suṁ�
naṁ sēsē Aṭugānuṁnnu maṁṭiprākāraṁ lessagā peṭe Aṭugā
nuṁnnu kaṭaḷasēsi visterākulaveṭi maṁnistimi yiṁtanuṁḍi
yavaru ganaka tamaḷacēta visterākulaveṭi sēyiṁcinānu tama
tallidaṁḍrulanu vāraṇāsini caṁpina pāpānaṁ
pōyinavāru yī dha¨rmānaku yavaru vakramayi
nānu vārē dēvatādrōhulu Ani yicina śāsanaṁ
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ .
ṣaṣṭhi¨rvaruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyate krimiḥ . maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
